title: pelargonium × sinapifolium
intro: Pelargonium × sinapifolium, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium, is a species of flowering plant in the geranium family. It is a perennial shrub native to South Africa, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is used to treat anxiety, stress, and digestive issues, due to its high content of geraniol and linalool, which have a calming effect on the body. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × sinapifolium, such as teas, essential oils, and tinctures, are commonly used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and improve overall well-being.
